text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At last, after scaling the mountain of paperwork
on my desk for days on end, it's all done...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's when Mejiro Bright comes in for a
meeting...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Forgive me, Trainer, but you appear rather
exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You've been holed up in this office quite a lot
lately, and frankly, I'm starting to worry.
choice_data_list:
I've finished my work, so you don't need to
worry about me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's wonderful news! Congratulations! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You deserve to be rewarded for all of your hard
work, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, of course! Might I interest you in a picnic on
academy grounds on our next day off?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The weather has been so nice recently. I'm quite
sure you'll have a relaxing time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee, then it's settled. ♪ Allow me to handle
all the preparation on the day of.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You needn't bring anything, Trainer. Your
presence will be plenty.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day I'm having a picnic with Mejiro
Bright. I head to the designated meeting place
and spot her unfolding a big plastic sheet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: One, two! Whew, that should do it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, greetings, Trainer. It's already time for our
picnic, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I've just finished laying down a sheet for us to sit
on. Everything's almost ready, just a moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...Dear me. What was the next step again?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, yes! Setting our places for tea. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: First, I need to take the saucers out of the basket.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Clatter... Clatter... Clatter...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just then, a strong gust of wind blows.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fwip, fwip, fwip...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Goodness me! The sheet I set out has been blown
away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I shall go and retrieve it at once.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
While I appreciate the thought, Trainer, today is
for you to put your feet up and relax.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You mustn't lift a finger. I shall be back in a
moment. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do as Mejiro Bright tells me and wait for her to
finish the preparations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In a way only she can, Mejiro Bright goes all out
in her efforts to set up our picnic.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
A kind lady at the cafeteria prepared this lovely
fruit platter for us to share. Do help yourself. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...Dear me, wherever did I stow the paring knife?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rustle, rustle, rustle...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
And here's our tea. Dober shared some of her
favorite blend with us.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Now then, first, the leaves go into the pot...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Swish... Swish...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter the task at hand, Mejiro Bright moves
at a slow and steady pace. That said, watching
her work is calming somehow...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes! A decorative flower would make this
quite the pretty picnic.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I shall go and find one. Please be patient
for just a little while longer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I realize that I'm now so relaxed that I can
actually feel the stress of the daily grind fading
away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Things took a little longer to arrange than
originally planned, but how did you find today?
choice_data_list: I feel ready to take on tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My! Well, I'm truly delighted to have been of
assistance. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I believe that the busier people become, the
more they tend to suppress their feelings.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
And it's precisely at times like those when it's best
to slow down and take things easy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I've learned something very important
from Mejiro Bright today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee. If you feel refreshed, then today was a
great success.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, the goal for which we both strive remains
some distance away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Let's keep focused and proceed with caution at
our own pace.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I've learned something very important
from Mejiro Bright today.
